---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement"
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Use Case

Why would this be useful? Who would benefit from it?  
_(e.g. "A cafe owner would be able to add daily specials without touching code")_

## 📐 Proposed Solution

How do you imagine it working? Wireframes, sketches, or code snippets are welcome.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you chose this one.

## 📎 Additional Context

Links, references, or anything else relevant.
